data.content: Fixed concurrent safety issue in agent-outcome-stats.ts. Switched from read-modify-write JSON array to append-only JSONL format using appendFile, which is atomic for small writes on POSIX. readOutcomeStats now parses JSONL line-by-line, gracefully skipping malformed lines. Added baseDir parameter for testability. New test file agent-outcome-stats.test.ts with 7 tests including a concurrent-append safety test that verifies 20 parallel appends produce 20 records. All quality gates pass: tsc clean, 2134 tests pass, build OK. Branch: work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix.
